# HeartCentered AI — Model Benchmarks
> Generated: 2026-04-07T02:20:00Z
> Models: 10

Comparative benchmarks for current-generation LLMs, emphasizing emotional intelligence (EQ-Bench) alongside reasoning, coding, and agentic performance.

## Claude Sonnet 4.6
Provider: Anthropic
ID: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6
Context: 1,000,000 tokens
Max output: 128,000 tokens
Pricing: $3.00 input / $15.00 output per 1M tokens (blended: $6.00)
Capabilities: tool use, reasoning, vision, web search, structured output
Scores: Reasoning: 50.4 | Coding: 46.4 | Agentic: 70.9
EQ Elo: 1876.8 | Empathy: 8.5 | Social Iq: 7.8 | Insight: 8.9 | Humanlike: 7.1 | Warm: 6.9
Chat Arena Elo: 1462
Speed: 47.0 tokens/sec

## Claude Opus 4.6
Provider: Anthropic
ID: anthropic/claude-opus-4.6
Context: 1,000,000 tokens
Max output: 128,000 tokens
Pricing: $5.00 input / $25.00 output per 1M tokens (blended: $10.00)
Capabilities: tool use, reasoning, vision, web search, structured output
Scores: Reasoning: 53.9 | Coding: 47.6 | Agentic: 74.8
EQ Elo: 1857.8 | Empathy: 8.0 | Social Iq: 7.5 | Insight: 8.9 | Humanlike: 6.9 | Warm: 7.1
Chat Arena Elo: 1499
Speed: 46.1 tokens/sec

## MiniMax M2.7
Provider: MiniMax
ID: minimax/minimax-m2.7
Context: 204,800 tokens
Max output: 131,072 tokens

Capabilities: tool use, reasoning, structured output
Scores: Reasoning: 58.5 | Coding: 41.9 | Agentic: 83.6
Chat Arena Elo: 1403
Speed: 41.9 tokens/sec

ID: xiaomi/mimo-v2-pro

Capabilities: tool use, reasoning, structured output
Scores: Reasoning: 58.2 | Coding: 41.4 | Agentic: 78.2
Chat Arena Elo: 1444

ID: z-ai/glm-5-turbo

Provider: StepFun
ID: stepfun/step-3.5-flash
Context: 262,144 tokens

Chat Arena Elo: 1392
Speed: 85.7 tokens/sec

## Qwen3.6 Plus
Provider: Qwen
ID: qwen/qwen3.6-plus:free
Context: 1,000,000 tokens
Max output: 65,536 tokens
Pricing: FREE
Capabilities: tool use, reasoning, vision, structured output
Scores: Reasoning: 57.0 | Coding: 41.3 | Agentic: 84.3
EQ Elo: 1417.4 | Empathy: 7.3 | Social Iq: 6.2 | Insight: 8.1 | Humanlike: 5.3 | Warm: 6.8
Chat Arena Elo: 1449
Speed: 44.0 tokens/sec
Note: Benchmark scores from Qwen3.5-397B (predecessor). PinchBench is from Qwen3.6 Plus directly.

## GPT-5.4
Provider: OpenAI
ID: openai/gpt-5.4
Context: 1,050,000 tokens
Max output: 128,000 tokens
Pricing: $2.50 input / $15.00 output per 1M tokens (blended: $5.62)
Capabilities: tool use, reasoning, vision, web search, structured output
Scores: Reasoning: 57.0 | Agentic: 87.6
EQ Elo: 1687.5 | Empathy: 8.2 | Social Iq: 7.7 | Insight: 9.4 | Humanlike: 6.3 | Warm: 6.4
Chat Arena Elo: 1484
Speed: 74.0 tokens/sec

## Grok 4.20
Provider: xAI
ID: x-ai/grok-4.20-20260309
Context: 2,000,000 tokens
Max output: 128,000 tokens
Pricing: $2.00 input / $6.00 output per 1M tokens (blended: $3.00)
Capabilities: tool use, reasoning, vision, web search, structured output
Scores: Reasoning: 48.0
EQ Elo: 856.4 | Empathy: 3.4 | Social Iq: 3.0 | Insight: 6.4 | Humanlike: 3.1 | Warm: 3.4
Chat Arena Elo: 1491
Speed: 271.0 tokens/sec
Note: EQ-Bench score is notably low (856) despite strong Arena ranking — suggests optimized for capability over emotional attunement.

## Gemini 3.1 Pro
Provider: Google
ID: google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview-20260219
Context: 1,048,576 tokens
Max output: 65,536 tokens
Pricing: $2.00 input / $12.00 output per 1M tokens (blended: $4.50)
Capabilities: tool use, reasoning, vision, structured output
Scores: Reasoning: 57.0
EQ Elo: 1548.7 | Empathy: 7.9 | Social Iq: 6.8 | Insight: 8.5 | Humanlike: 6.6 | Warm: 7.4
Chat Arena Elo: 1494
Speed: 127.0 tokens/sec
